use_when: User provides a PDF, Word, PowerPoint, spreadsheet, image, local file path, or document URL.
User asks to parse, read, extract text from, convert, OCR, or summarize a file.
ask_user_when: The document appears sensitive and would be uploaded to mineru.net.

use_when: User asks to polish Chinese prose, reduce AI tone, revise reports, revise academic text, or make writing sound natural.
User asks to control FreeCAD, create CAD geometry, export STEP/STL, or run FEM workflows.
ask_user_when: Missing dimensions or material constraints would change the model structure.

use_when: User asks to generate or edit images through GPT Image 2 from Codex.
